chunks.en: Today I want to talk about leaving work.
chunks.ja: 今日は仕事を終えて帰ることについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually finish work around six in the evening.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい夕方6時ごろに仕事が終わります。

chunks.en: Before I leave, I turn off my computer.
chunks.ja: 帰る前に、私はパソコンの電源を切ります。

chunks.en: I also check my email one last time.
chunks.ja: それから最後にもう一度メールを確認します。

chunks.en: When I go home, I say goodbye to my coworkers.
chunks.ja: 帰るとき、私は同僚にさようならと言います。

chunks.en: Sometimes I say, see you tomorrow, to my team.
chunks.ja: ときどきチームに「また明日」と言います。

chunks.en: After a long day, I feel tired but happy.
chunks.ja: 長い一日のあと、私は疲れているけれど幸せな気持ちです。

chunks.en: So that's how I finish my work day.
chunks.ja: というわけで、これが私の一日の仕事の終え方です。

outline: Point: finish time and things I do before leaving
Point: what I say to coworkers and how I feel
Wrap-up: sum up my end-of-day routine

modelTalk.text: I usually finish work around six o'clock. Sometimes it's a little later. First, I save my files. Then I turn off my computer. I put my papers in the drawer. I take my cup to the kitchen. I put on my coat and grab my bag. I say "Bye, see you tomorrow" to my coworkers. They smile and say bye to me. Then I walk to the door and leave. After a long day, I feel tired. But I'm happy too. I like going home. On the way, I listen to music. It's nice to relax. I can't wait to have dinner.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about leaving work.
chunks.ja: 今日は仕事を終えて帰ることについて話したいです。

chunks.en: I usually finish my work around six o'clock.
chunks.ja: 私はたいてい6時ごろに仕事を終えます。

chunks.en: Before I leave, I turn off my computer.
chunks.ja: 帰る前に、私はパソコンの電源を切ります。

chunks.en: I also check my emails one last time.
chunks.ja: 最後にもう一度メールも確認します。

chunks.en: When I go home, I say goodbye to everyone.
chunks.ja: 帰るとき、私はみんなにさよならと言います。

chunks.en: After a long day, I feel tired but happy.
chunks.ja: 長い一日のあと、私は疲れているけれど満足しています。

chunks.en: So that's how I finish my work day.
chunks.ja: というわけで、これが私の一日の仕事の終え方です。

outline: Point 1: finish time and things I do before leaving
Point 2: what I say to coworkers
Wrap-up: how I feel after a long day

modelTalk.text: I usually finish work at six o'clock. Sometimes I stay a little longer. But most days I leave on time. Before I go, I turn off my computer. I clean up my desk too. I put my papers away. Then I check my bag for my keys and phone. I say goodbye to my coworkers. I tell them, "See you tomorrow!" They smile and wave at me. It's a nice moment. After a long day, I'm really tired. My feet hurt sometimes. But I'm happy too. I did my work well. Now I can go home and rest. I can't wait for dinner!
